title: Docking Bay 15
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Docking Bay 15''' was a docking bay on the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] deck of the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'', owned by [[Booster Terrik]]. It was large enough to accommodate [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI transport]], the ''[[Wild Karrde]]''. It was sometimes used as a mobile repair base and was also home of the ''[[Pulsar Skate]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-11-18 -->[[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']]
